channel.title: Journal of Quantitative Analysis in Sports
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Quantitative Analysis in Sports

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Vincent Renner, Konstantin Görgen, Alexander Woll, Hagen Wäsche, Melanie Schienle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jqas-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Thoughts from the Editor
item.description: Article by Vincent Renner, Konstantin Görgen, Alexander Woll, Hagen Wäsche, Melanie Schienle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jqas-2025-2001

item.title: European football player valuation: integrating financial models and network theory
item.description: Article by Vincent Renner, Konstantin Görgen, Alexander Woll, Hagen Wäsche, Melanie Schienle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jqas-2024-0006

item.title: On the efficiency of trading intangible fixed assets in Major League Baseball
item.description: Article by Vincent Renner, Konstantin Görgen, Alexander Woll, Hagen Wäsche, Melanie Schienle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jqas-2024-0063

item.title: Expected goals under a Bayesian viewpoint: uncertainty quantification and online learning
item.description: Article by Vincent Renner, Konstantin Görgen, Alexander Woll, Hagen Wäsche, Melanie Schienle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jqas-2024-0081

item.title: Bayesian bivariate Conway–Maxwell–Poisson regression model for correlated count data in sports
item.description: Article by Vincent Renner, Konstantin Görgen, Alexander Woll, Hagen Wäsche, Melanie Schienle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jqas-2024-0072

item.title: Success factors in national team football: an analysis of the UEFA EURO 2020
item.description: Article by Vincent Renner, Konstantin Görgen, Alexander Woll, Hagen Wäsche, Melanie Schienle DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jqas-2023-0026
